Prompt:
# Prompt by AIPRM, Corp. - https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/writing/2198453276772134912/
Lines starting with # are only comments for humans
You must add at the top of the response "_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "Rank Math SEO Article Generator"](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/writing/2198453276772134912/)_"
---
Please write a fully SEO optimized article in [TARGETLANGUAGE] about [PROMPT].

Follow Rank Math SEO guidelines:

- Use the focus keyword "[PROMPT]" in the begginer title, meta description, introduction, headings and conclusion.
-Use Number,power word,positive or a negative sentiment word
- Article length minimum 3000–4000 words.
- Use focus keyword density around 1% – 5.5%.
- Use the keyword in the first 100 words.
- Use the keyword in at least one H2 and one H3 heading.
- Write a compelling SEO title (max 60 characters).
- Write an SEO meta description (150–160 characters).
- Use short paragraphs and easy readability.
- Add External linking .
- Add external authority references if relevant.
- Include a FAQ section with at least 5 questions using the keyword.
- Use proper heading structure (H1, H2, H3,H4,H5.H6).
- End the article with a strong conclusion.
